Source: Microsoft Graph API Changelog
URL: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Microsoft Graph Changelog Summary

## Recent Permission Changes (Feb 23, 2026)
- `FileStorageContainerType.Manage.All` and `FileStorageContainerTypeReg.Manage.All` delegated permissions no longer require admin consent
- `ThreatSubmission.Read` and `ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite` now require admin consent

## Identity & Access Governance Additions

**Lifecycle Workflows Enhancements (Feb 19, 2026):**
- Added `administrationScopeTargets` relationship to workflowBase resource
- Administration scope targeting capabilities for workflow management

**Nov 25, 2025:**
- Added `userInactivityTrigger` resource for lifecycle workflows based on user inactivity detection

**Nov 10, 2025:**
- Scope-based workflow activation: `activationScope`, `activateGroupScope`, `activateUserScope`

## Deprecation Notices
- Dec 11, 2025: Removed `conditionalAccessAudience` resource type (Beta)
- Dec 3, 2025: Added `microsoftRevokedSessions` member to riskDetail enumeration
